language.description: Choose the language used for buttons, menus, labels, and other UI text.
language.hint: This only changes the app interface. It does not translate note titles, note content, or generated study material.

reminders.description: Get one daily browser notification when you have study pages due.
reminders.catchUpHint: If nothing is due at that time, Rememo will still send one reminder later that same day when pages become due.

status.unsupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser

backup.description: Download a complete JSON backup of your notes, study questions, and FSRS study state. Restoring a backup imports it as a copy: every imported note gets a fresh ID and is added alongside your existing notes.
backup.importHint: Restoring never overwrites or deletes existing notes. Imported notes appear at the top of the tree.
backup.preserveStudyStateHint: When enabled, imported pages keep their FSRS schedule (due date, stability, difficulty). When disabled, imported pages start from scratch.

toast.importWarnings: Repaired during import: {{orphans}} orphan, {{cycles}} cycle, {{droppedEmbeds}} out-of-scope embeds, {{malformedEmbeds}} malformed embeds.

parseError.cannotReadFile: Could not read the selected file.
parseError.invalidJson: The selected file is not valid JSON.
parseError.invalidShape: The selected file is not a Rememo backup.
parseError.unsupportedFormat: The selected file is not a Rememo backup.
parseError.unsupportedVersion: This backup file uses a version that is not supported by the current app.

offline.description: Cache your notes on this device for read-only access when you're offline. Editing, learning, and AI features stay online-only.

errors.network: Could not reach the server. Check your internet connection and try again.
errors.notAuthenticated: Sign in before enabling offline access.
errors.totalSize: Your notes exceed the offline cache size limit.
errors.noteTooLarge: One of your notes exceeds the per-note size limit.
errors.unknown: Could not enable offline access. Please try again.
